1815200.name: Computer Develop Simulator 2022
1815200.description:
Computer Develop Simulator 2022 Meme Reset - it's inovation simulator there you replay the history of computer industry by starting your own company for computer construction. You can choose some ready components from other hardware companies or develop it yourself. You can choose parameters and some unique technologies for you computer. After you can sold it for increase your income for growth of bussines. You can choose cost of personal computers and hire personal. Keep track of the technological level, logistics, marketing and fanbase in order to keep your business afloat.

Starting in the 70s

Start your adventure in a small office in the 70s. Enjoy choosing computer components and other computer parameters. After some releases you can be little richer and you company can create computer components by itself

Grow your company

Once you have successfully developed and sold computers you can move into better office and hire more personal for your company.

Create and sold computers better than your competitors and become the best computer dev company in the world!
